'''yazhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabaccy|tabaccy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabaccy|tabaccy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yazhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzhiyith|yæzhiyith]] || [[word:yæzhiyij|yæzhiyij]] || [[word:yæzhiyish|yæzhiyish]] || [[word:yæzhiyi|yæzhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhuzhuyuth|yazhuzhuyuth]] || [[word:yazhuzhuyuj|yazhuzhuyuj]] || [[word:yazhuzhuyush|yazhuzhuyush]] || [[word:yazhuzhuyu|yazhuzhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhuyuth|yazhuyuth]] || [[word:yazhuyuj|yazhuyuj]] || [[word:yazhuyush|yazhuyush]] || [[word:yazhuyu|yazhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhufyuth|yazhufyuth]] || [[word:yazhufyuj|yazhufyuj]] || [[word:yazhufyush|yazhufyush]] || [[word:yazhufyuf|yazhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhuyuthu|yazhuyuthu]] || [[word:yazhuyuju|yazhuyuju]] || [[word:yazhuyushu|yazhuyushu]] || [[word:yazhuyuku|yazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhuyuth|yazhuyuth]] || [[word:yazhuyuj|yazhuyuj]] || [[word:yazhuyush|yazhuyush]] || [[word:yazhuyu|yazhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhuyuthul|yazhuyuthul]] || [[word:yazhuyujul|yazhuyujul]] || [[word:yazhuyushul|yazhuyushul]] || [[word:yazhuyukul|yazhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhuyuthuthu|yazhuyuthuthu]] || [[word:yazhuyujuju|yazhuyujuju]] || [[word:yazhuyushushu|yazhuyushushu]] || [[word:yazhuyuku|yazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhuyuthun|yazhuyuthun]] || [[word:yazhuyujun|yazhuyujun]] || [[word:yazhuyushun|yazhuyushun]] || [[word:yazhuyukun|yazhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhuyuthuoro|yazhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:yazhuyujuoro|yazhuyujuoro]] || [[word:yazhuyushuoro|yazhuyushuoro]] || [[word:yazhuyukuoro|yazhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
